class.name: Glob
class.brief_description: Filesystem glob and filename pattern matching utilities.
class.description: [Glob] is a static utility class that provides Python-style glob and [code]fnmatch[/code] pattern matching. GDRE uses it internally to implement the [code]--include[/code] and [code]--exclude[/code] filters on several CLI commands, and it is exposed to GDScript so exporters and custom tooling can apply the same matching rules. All methods are static. Patterns support [code]*[/code], [code]?[/code], character classes, and the recursive [code]**[/code] segment.

method.name: dirs_in_names
method.description: Returns the entries of [param dirs] that are ancestor directories of any path in [param names]. Useful for pruning empty parent directories from an export set.

method.name: fnmatch
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param name] matches [param pattern] using Unix shell-style wildcards. Matching is case-sensitive on Unix and case-insensitive on Windows, mirroring Python's [code]fnmatch.fnmatch[/code].

method.name: fnmatch_list
method.description: Returns the subset of [param names] that match any pattern in [param patterns]. When [param exclude_matches] is [code]true[/code], returns names that match [i]none[/i] of the patterns instead.

method.name: glob
method.description: Returns the filesystem paths that match the glob pattern [param pathname] (non-recursive, except where [code]**[/code] is used). When [param hidden] is [code]true[/code], dot-files are included.

method.name: glob_list
method.description: Runs [method glob] against each entry in [param pathnames] and returns the accumulated results.

method.name: names_in_dirs
method.description: Returns the entries of [param names] that live inside any directory in [param dirs].

method.name: pattern_match_list
method.description: Returns the subset of [param names] that match any pattern in [param patterns]. Equivalent to [method fnmatch_list] with [code]exclude_matches[/code] left at [code]false[/code].

method.name: rglob
method.description: Recursive variant of [method glob]: returns every path under the given directory tree that matches [param pathname].

method.name: rglob_list
method.description: Runs [method rglob] against each entry in [param pathnames] and returns the accumulated results.
